themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are intensifying their advocacy for 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social benefits, housing, and employment. This theme is prominently featured in Spain, Italy, and France, reflecting a broader transnational trend of anti-immigration rhetoric and policy proposals.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox continues to push 'national priority' policies in regional governments, particularly in Andalusia and Aragón, demanding that social benefits and aid be restricted to Spanish nationals.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: The party's leadership, including Jordan Bardella, has emphasized 'national priority' in housing and welfare policies, aligning with Vox's stance in Spain.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: While not explicitly using the term 'national priority,' the Italian government has adopted policies that restrict immigration and prioritize Italian citizens in social welfare programs.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK has adopted similar rhetoric, advocating for stricter immigration controls and prioritizing British citizens in access to public services.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS has framed its policies around protecting Polish interests, particularly in opposition to EU migration quotas, aligning with the broader 'national priority' theme.

themes.title: Hungary’s political transition dominates coverage
themes.blurb: The political transition in Hungary, marked by the end of Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule and the swearing-in of Péter Magyar as the new prime minister, has captured significant attention across right-wing and far-right media. This theme reflects broader concerns about shifts in power, EU relations, and democratic reforms in Central Europe.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Coverage focuses on the historic transition from Orbán's rule to Magyar's leadership, emphasizing the implications for Hungary's domestic and foreign policies.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: U.S. right-wing media highlights the transition as a potential shift in Hungary's alignment with Western allies, particularly regarding EU and NATO relations.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media frames the transition as a critical moment for Central European politics, with potential implications for Poland-Hungary relations.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian coverage emphasizes the impact of Hungary's transition on EU cohesion and the broader right-wing movement in Europe.

countries.name: 🇸🇰 General (Slovakia)
countries.note: Slovak media discusses the transition in the context of regional stability and potential shifts in Hungary's foreign policy.

themes.title: Reform UK’s electoral surge reshapes UK politics
themes.blurb: Reform UK's unprecedented gains in local elections across England, Scotland, and Wales have reshaped the UK's political landscape, challenging the dominance of the Labour and Conservative parties. This theme reflects broader discontent with traditional parties and the rise of far-right populism in Western democracies.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's electoral success in local elections, including gains in Labour strongholds, has positioned the party as a major political force in the UK.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: U.S. right-wing media highlights Reform UK's rise as part of a broader global trend of populist movements challenging established political parties.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian media frames Reform UK's success as a warning for traditional parties in Europe, emphasizing the potential for similar shifts in Italy.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: French far-right media draws parallels between Reform UK's rise and the growing influence of Rassemblement National in France.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Spanish media discusses Reform UK's success as part of a broader European trend of far-right parties gaining ground in local and national elections.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's policies, particularly his foreign policy decisions, economic measures, and domestic reforms, continue to dominate right-wing and far-right media coverage worldwide. This theme reflects Trump's enduring influence on global conservative movements and the alignment of right-wing parties with his agenda.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Coverage focuses on Trump's domestic and foreign policies, including his stance on Iran, immigration, and economic reforms.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian media highlights the alignment between Trump's policies and those of Giorgia Meloni's government, particularly on immigration and transatlantic relations.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media emphasizes Trump's influence on PiS's policies, particularly regarding U.S.-Poland relations and defense cooperation.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's policies and rhetoric are often framed in relation to Trump's political strategies, particularly on immigration and national sovereignty.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Argentinian media draws parallels between Trump's economic policies and those of Javier Milei, particularly regarding deregulation and fiscal conservatism.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption scandals involving high-ranking officials in far-right governments have become a dominant theme in right-wing and far-right media. These scandals are eroding public trust and challenging the anti-corruption narratives that these parties often promote.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: The scandal involving Manuel Adorni, Chief of Staff to President Javier Milei, has dominated coverage, with allegations of illicit enrichment and undeclared cryptocurrency transactions.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Coverage focuses on the transition of power and the potential for investigations into corruption under Viktor Orbán's regime.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media highlights ongoing corruption investigations involving PiS officials, including allegations of cronyism and misuse of public funds.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Spanish media discusses corruption allegations involving Vox officials, particularly in regional governments where the party holds power.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: U.S. right-wing media covers corruption allegations involving Trump administration officials, including Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick.
